name: Card Trick
flavor: A flick of the wrist and the top card leaves the deck edge-first, humming, sharp enough to open a throat.
description: You snap a razor-edged card at a creature you can see within range. Make a {{trick attack|d20 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} against the target; on a hit it takes [[1d6]] slashing damage. Because this is an attack roll and not a saving throw, it can be parried like any other attack.
sheetSummary: Action, 30 ft. Ranged trick attack ({{trick attack|d20 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}). Hit: [[1d6]] slashing. Scales at 5/11/17. Can be parried.
